localBusiness.name: Milani Salons
localBusiness.description: Milani Salons is a professional salon serving Maplewood, MN and surrounding areas.

mainEntity.name: How much does a haircut cost at a salon in Maplewood?

acceptedAnswer.text: At Milani Salons in Maplewood, our haircuts range from $35-$65 depending on hair length and complexity, with senior discounts available for clients 65+.

mainEntity.name: What's the average wait time for appointments at Milani Salons in Maplewood?

acceptedAnswer.text: We typically schedule appointments within 2-3 business days, and walk-ins are welcome with an average wait of 15-30 minutes depending on stylist availability.

mainEntity.name: Do you offer hair coloring services in Maplewood?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, we offer full color services including single-process ($55-$85), balayage ($90-$150), and color corrections, performed by our certified color specialists.

mainEntity.name: How long does a full hair color appointment take in Maplewood?

acceptedAnswer.text: Full color services at our Maplewood location typically take 1.5-3 hours depending on hair length, current color, and desired results.

mainEntity.name: What are your hours of operation in Maplewood, MN?

acceptedAnswer.text: We're open Tuesday-Thursday 9am-7pm, Friday-Saturday 9am-5pm, and Sunday 10am-4pm; we're closed Mondays.

mainEntity.name: Can I book a same-day appointment at Milani Salons in Maplewood?

acceptedAnswer.text: Same-day appointments depend on stylist availability; call us at our Maplewood location to check, and we always accommodate walk-ins.

mainEntity.name: How much do highlights cost at your Maplewood salon?

acceptedAnswer.text: Partial highlights at Milani Salons start at $65, while full highlights range from $85-$125 depending on hair thickness and coverage needed.

mainEntity.name: Do you offer perms or chemical treatments in Maplewood?

acceptedAnswer.text: We offer permanent waves ($75-$100), keratin treatments ($150-$250), and Brazilian blowouts, all performed by licensed technicians in our Maplewood salon.

mainEntity.name: What's the price for a blowout service at Milani Salons in Maplewood?

acceptedAnswer.text: Blowouts at our Maplewood location are $40-$55 for wash and style, with upcharges for special event styling available.

mainEntity.name: Are your stylists at the Maplewood location licensed and certified?

acceptedAnswer.text: All our stylists at Milani Salons in Maplewood are Minnesota-licensed cosmetologists with ongoing continuing education in the latest techniques.

mainEntity.name: How long does a typical haircut appointment last in Maplewood?

acceptedAnswer.text: Standard haircuts at our Maplewood salon take 30-45 minutes, while complex cuts or styling consultations may take up to an hour.

mainEntity.name: Do you offer wedding or special event styling in Maplewood?

acceptedAnswer.text: We specialize in bridal and event styling with packages starting at $200; book at least 2 weeks in advance at our Maplewood location.

mainEntity.name: What's the minimum age for services at Milani Salons in Maplewood?

acceptedAnswer.text: We service all ages, though chemical treatments like perms require parental consent for clients under 16.

mainEntity.name: Do you offer men's haircuts at your Maplewood salon?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, we offer professional men's cuts for $30-$40 with fades, lines, and beard trims available at our Maplewood location.

mainEntity.name: Can you fix a bad haircut from another salon in Maplewood?

acceptedAnswer.text: We offer color corrections and cuts to address issues from other salons; consultations at our Maplewood location are free to assess the work needed.

mainEntity.name: How much do hair extensions cost at Milani Salons in Maplewood?

acceptedAnswer.text: We offer tape-in extensions ($200-$400 installed) and clip-in extensions ($100-$300); our Maplewood stylists provide free consultations to match your hair type.

mainEntity.name: What should I do if I have a hair emergency near Maplewood?

acceptedAnswer.text: Call our Maplewood location immediately at [phone number]; we squeeze in emergency appointments for damage or urgent styling needs when possible.

mainEntity.name: Do you use organic or chemical-free products at your Maplewood salon?

acceptedAnswer.text: We use professional-grade products; we offer ammonia-free and sulfate-free options upon request at our Maplewood salon.

mainEntity.name: How much does a deep conditioning treatment cost in Maplewood?

acceptedAnswer.text: Deep conditioning treatments at Milani Salons in Maplewood are $25-$40 and take 20-30 minutes, perfect for damaged or dry hair.

mainEntity.name: Do you offer gift certificates at Milani Salons in Maplewood?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, we sell gift certificates in any amount at our Maplewood location; they never expire and can be purchased online or in-salon.
